title: End Cover Epic - [DP]
description: An epic song for dragon fight. – [RESOURSEPACK REQUIRED!!!]
body:
This is a Datapack, which adds an epic background music while fighting the enderdragon!

**[RESOURSEPACK REQUIRED!!]**

A RESOURCEPACK – https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/end-cover-rp
